name: Leather Armor
desc: Leather armor, providing minimal protection for minimal weight.

name: Reinforced Leather Armor
desc: Hardened leather armor with additional layers for enhanced protection.

name: Gambeson
desc: Additional padding and reinforcements that, while not providing a specific defense, generally improves the ability of the armor to absorb hits.

name: Flamecraft Robes
desc: Robes covered in sigils and symbols to enhance their ability to channel flamecraft.
effect: While wearing this _Clothing_ you may not wear any other Armor that is not _Organic_, as other elements would disrupt the enchantment.

abilities.name: Flame-Proof
abilities.effect: Increase your _Resistance_ to _Fire_ by 1 step. Additionally, if you have flamecraft, gain 1 _Essence_ at _Respite_.

abilities.name: Blade-Proof
abilities.effect: Increase your _Resistance_ to _Slash_ and _Stab_ by 1 step.

name: Traveler's Boots
desc: Sturdy boots made for traveling the world.

abilities.name: Walking Shoes
abilities.effect: On each day of Travel, roll a d6. On a 5 or higher you may remove a _Fatigue_ stake, including automatic ones.

name: Iron Boots
desc: Solid boots protect against hostile terrain and make it easier to travel the world.

abilities.name: Walking Shoes
abilities.effect: On each day of Travel, roll a d6. On a 6, you may remove a _Fatigue_ stake, including automatic ones.

abilities.name: Iron Soles
abilities.effect: Reduce the Damage by 2 for all _Terrain_ effects you step on.

name: Iron Helmet
desc: A sturdy helmet that can be difference between a glancing blow and a lethal strike.

name: Traveler's Cloak
desc: A thick relatively waterproof cloak that, while not specialized, is useful for a wide variety of climates.

abilities.name: Cloaked Protection
abilities.effect: When traveling through harsh weather, roll a d6. On a 4-, you may demote a single _Affliction_ or _Fatigue_ Hazard related to said Weather. On a 5+, instead remove it.

name: Iron Plating
desc: Iron plates in strategic places, providing an extra layer of protection against most attacks.

name: Light Natural Armor
desc: Natural armor, whether that be chitin, a thin shell, or natural plating.

name: Medium Natural Armor
desc: Natural armor, whether that be chitin, a thin shell, or natural plating.
